scripts.build: bun run styles:build && vite build && mkdir -p dist/client/files && cp src/generated/styles.css dist/client/styles.css && cp ../../node_modules/@fontsource-variable/geist/files/*.woff2 ../../node_modules/@fontsource-variable/space-grotesk/files/*.woff2 dist/client/files/
scripts.deploy: bun run build && bunx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc
